name: Lykon
description: At-home blood and DNA tests with personalized nutrition/health recommendations. Founded 2015. Acquired by Lifesum in June 2024.

name: cerascreen
description: Self-test kits for blood, urine, saliva, breath gas, stool analysis. Results and personalized health recommendations delivered digitally. Founded 2012.

name: Aware
description: In-lab blood testing with 110+ biomarkers, personalized health reports in app within 24h, subscription-based retesting. Labs in Berlin, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Munich, Vienna, Amsterdam.

name: theblood
description: Subscription-based menstrual blood testing via menstrual cup. Insights into cycles and health biomarkers non-invasively. Founded 2022.

name: Medisera Health
description: Private blood tests in 30+ Swedish cities with personalized service. Partners with Karolinska. Founded 2019.

name: Testmottagningen
description: Sweden's largest range of blood tests and health checks at 160+ locations. Samples analyzed at Karolinska, Synlab, Unilabs.

name: Vital (by Puhti/Mehilainen)
description: Lab tests without referral at 100+ locations across Sweden. Results in 2-4 business days. Launched by Puhti (Finland). Backed by Mehilainen.

name: Nordic Wellth
description: Lifestyle medicine clinic with online lab test ordering, 100+ testing locations across Sweden. Blood tests with nutritional/lifestyle coaching.

name: Homed-IQ
description: At-home self-sampling health tests. Active in NL, Germany, Belgium, Austria. Sold at Albert Heijn supermarkets. Founded 2020.

name: PostYourLab / Labonovum
description: Netherlands' largest online lab diagnostics using fingerstick. Kit by mail, blood at home, post to lab, results online. 20,000+ users.

name: Bloedwaardentest.nl
description: Netherlands' largest blood test provider, 800+ blood drawing stations. Order online, visit collection point, results with explanations by email.

name: Healsens
description: App-based preventive healthcare platform in NL, Belgium, Germany. Customizes checkups by age, gender, history. Subscription. Founded 2019.

name: Labplusarts
description: Preventive blood tests without GP referral across 750+ locations in the Netherlands.

name: Test Mijn Bloed
description: Belgian private blood testing center. Preventive tests without prescription. Results via email within 10 days.

name: Bloody Good Tests
description: Order private blood tests online, 4,000+ NATA-accredited collection centres, results in 48h via dashboard. No GP referral.

name: iMedical
description: Australia-wide direct-access pathology. Order blood tests online without referral through NATA-accredited labs.

name: ClearLabs
description: Direct access to private blood testing, 2,000+ collection centres. Results in 2-3 business days with trend tracking.

name: Abby Health
description: AI-powered health platform, pathology services across 170+ clinics in Australia. Symptom analysis, blood test ordering, doctor-reviewed results.

name: i-screen
description: Health screening with biomarker tracking. Test kits by mail for home collection, results via dashboard. Australia and New Zealand.

name: Blood Tests Canada
description: Private blood work in Ontario, Quebec, Manitoba. Order online, visit service centre, results electronically. No doctor referral.

name: TeleTest
description: Private blood work and diagnostics at nearby labs without doctor referral. Ontario and British Columbia.

name: Ichor Health (Avovita Wellness)
description: Private blood testing, partners with Mayo Clinic Labs. 50+ cancer markers, prenatal, preventive panels. Secure portal.

name: Molecular You
description: Predictive health platform measuring 250+ biomarkers. AI-driven personalized lifestyle recommendations. Partners with Dynacare.

name: WhiteCoat
description: Leading SG telemedicine provider with premium health screening at home via app. Blood/urine test packages. Founded 2018.

name: Speedoc
description: Virtual clinic with home-visit health screenings, telemedicine. Basic to comprehensive blood panels. Founded 2017.

name: ATA Medical
description: Home health screening with trained medical professionals. Tests in 15 minutes, starting S$54.50.

name: Lucis
description: Preventive health check-ups in certified labs, 180+ biomarkers. Subscription EUR 490/year. France, UK, Ireland, Portugal. 500K+ tests. Y Combinator backed. Founded 2025.
investors: General Catalyst, Y Combinator, Kima Ventures

name: MonBilanBio
description: Blood tests without prescription. Algorithm-based questionnaire recommends personalized biological tests.

name: Ailin Health
description: DTC health testing with self-sampling kits, lab analysis, AI. 30+ products. Results in 48h. Google for Startups alumni. Founded 2021.

name: Melio
description: Venous blood testing across 20 centres in Madrid. 10+ profiles, 100+ health markers. Results on mobile. Launched Oct 2023.

name: Testinclick
description: Italian platform for lab tests at home. Self-collection kits for capillary blood, urine, saliva. Results online.

name: MEDELIT
description: Home diagnostic services across Italy — blood tests, ultrasounds, ECG, checkups. At-home blood collection by certified nurses.

name: Blodsjekk
description: Norwegian platform for blood tests online without doctor's appointment. General, Extended, Sports packages.

name: Dr.Dropin
description: Digi-physical healthcare platform, 25 clinics covering 50%+ of Norway. Blood tests, urine tests, rapid tests + consultations. Founded 2017.

name: Bloodworks
description: Irish private blood testing — 40+ tests. Sports, Fatigue, Cardiovascular profiles. Results by email.

name: The Health Lab
description: Partners with Randox for blood tests in fitness centres and pharmacies across Dublin area.

name: Folacare
description: 1,250+ blood tests and screening services. INAB-certified labs. No GP referral required.

name: Ahead Health
description: AI-powered preventive health — full-body MRI, blood tests (81 biomarkers), CT scans in 30 min. Founded 2024 by ex-Google execs. Expanding to DE, NL, AT.

name: Labology
description: Preventive blood testing in Zurich and Geneva without prescription. Essential, Fatigue, Sport, Nutrition panels.

name: CARE
description: Preventive health check platform across 9 Swiss cities. Blood tests at partner labs. Results via CARE app. Hormones, vitamins, longevity.

name: Yourself Health
description: Digital health startup — home health check-ups. Test kits by Swiss Post, analyzed by Medisyn/Bioanalytica/Dr. Risch.

name: Rikai
description: Home-sampling kits for blood testing with results and health insights. Founded Feb 2021.

name: Macromo
description: AI-driven health insights via DNA analysis and at-home blood tests. App integrates lab results and wearable data. 5,000+ users. Sold via Alza.cz.

name: Biogena (diagnostics)
description: Austria's leading health brand. At-home capillary blood and urine self-tests for micronutrient status and metabolism.

name: BlodKlar
description: Danish platform for direct-access blood tests without referral. Wellness checks, disease screenings, health assessments.

name: Valida Health
description: Danish diagnostic clinic — prevention and health optimization. Blood tests, intolerance, hormones, DNA, intestinal flora.

name: Lægerne Danmark
description: Private healthcare — blood tests and health screening packages without referral.

name: Puhti
description: Lab tests without referral at 75 labs in 50 municipalities in Finland. Launched Vital in Sweden. Founded 2018. Acquired by Mehilainen 2020.

name: BODYiQ (by Awanui)
description: NZ's leading self-requested testing service. 80+ tests, 150+ collection centres. Pathologist-designed panels. GP access if abnormal.

name: Pocket Lab
description: Personalized testing — diabetes, cholesterol, STI, iron, thyroid. Nationwide NZ. From $39.

name: i-screen (NZ)
description: Health screening. Home test kits, returned by post, results via dashboard. Also operates in Australia.
